content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Audited the existing run-lifecycle implementation and found the original bead scope already present in the current tree, so no additional code changes were needed. The repository already writes and removes `run.pid`, `run status` reports stale running snapshots, `run resume` auto-recovers stale Running state, `run stop` handles both live and stale CLI-owned runs, and SIGTERM/shutdown cleanup persists interrupted snapshots before exit. Validation confirmed the current implementation is functionally in place; the only unmet acceptance item is repo-wide `cargo clippy` cleanliness due to unrelated pre-existing lint failures.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect the current implementation in `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`, and `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs` to determine which parts of the original run-liveness bead were already implemented.
2. [Completed] Verify the original bead requirements against the current code: PID/liveness tracking, stale detection in `run status`, automatic stale recovery in `run resume`, `run stop` behavior, and SIGTERM/shutdown cleanup paths.
3. [Skipped] Apply code changes for any missing original-bead behavior.
4. [Completed] Run validation commands required by the acceptance criteria and capture any remaining blockers.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo test` passed on the current tree.
- `cargo fmt --check` passed on the current tree.
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` failed due to existing unrelated lint errors, including `dead_code` in `src/adapters/fs.rs:1122`, an unread field in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:7074`, and additional pre-existing clippy violations in `src/cli/project.rs`, `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs`, `src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs`, and other non-bead modules.
- Code inspection confirmed the original bead behavior already exists: `FileSystem::{write_pid_file, read_pid_file, remove_pid_file, is_pid_alive}` in `src/adapters/fs.rs`; stale status reporting and stop/resume recovery logic in `src/cli/run.rs`; PID-file writes and stale-running resume reconciliation in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`; shutdown/cancellation handoff cleanup in `src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs`.

## Outstanding Risks

- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings` fails on pre-existing unrelated lints outside this bead, so the clippy acceptance criterion is not currently satisfied on the current tree.
- Two `run stop` timing-sensitive CLI tests remain ignored/flaky in the existing suite (`run_stop_reconciles_running_snapshot_after_sigterm_handoff_removes_pid` and `run_stop_sigkill_finalizes_snapshot_even_when_backend_cleanup_fails`).
- The worktree had an unrelated untracked path (`.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-6/`); it was left untouched.
